attribs.name: personality_traits
attribs.current:
I believe that anything worth doing is worth doing right. I can't help it I'm a perfectionist.

I like to talk at length about my profession.

attribs.name: ideals
attribs.current: Community. It is the duty of all civilized people to strengthen the bonds of community and the security of civilization. (Lawful)

attribs.name: bonds
attribs.current: One day I will return to my clan and prove that I am the greatest crafter of them all.

attribs.name: flaws
attribs.current: No one must ever learn that I once stole money from clan coffers.

attribs.name: repeating_traits_-MjQsZBdMhf1EslE89zz_description
attribs.current: You have a limited well of stamina that you can draw on to protect yourself from harm. On your turn, you can use a bonus action to regain hit points equal to 1d10 + your fighter level. Once you use this feature, you must finish a short or long rest before you can use it again.

attribs.name: repeating_traits_-MjQsZBe9CYbhGN8bU3Y_description
attribs.current: While you are wearing armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC.

attribs.name: repeating_traits_-MjQsZBe9CYbhGN8bU3Z_description
attribs.current:
You were created to have remarkable fortitude, represented by the following benefits:
• You have advantage on saving throws against being poisoned, and you have resistance to poison damage.
• You don’t need to eat, drink, or breathe.
• You are immune to disease.
• You don’t need to sleep, and magic can’t put you to sleep.

attribs.name: repeating_traits_-MjQsZBe9CYbhGN8bU3a_description
attribs.current: When you take a long rest, you must spend at least six hours in an inactive, motionless state, rather than sleeping. In this state, you appear inert, but it doesn’t render you unconscious, and you can see and hear as normal.

attribs.name: repeating_traits_-MjQsZBf7ViuibYQrGjR_description
attribs.current:
Your body has built-in defensive layers, which can be enhanced with armor:
• You gain a +1 bonus to Armor Class.
• You can don only armor with which you have proficiency. To don armor other than a shield, you must incorporate it into your body over the course of 1 hour, during which you remain in contact with the armor. To doff armor, you must spend 1 hour removing it. You can rest while donning or doffing armor in this way.
• While you live, the armor incorporated into your body can’t be removed from your body against your will.

attribs.name: repeating_traits_-MjQsZBgZlK1dydK9Iw5_description
attribs.current: As well respected as clan crafters are among outsiders, no one esteems them quite so highly as dwarves do. You always have free room and board in any place where shield dwarves or gold dwarves dwell, and the individuals in such a settlement might vie among themselves to determine who can offer you (and possibly your compatriots) the finest accommodations and assistance.

attribs.name: repeating_inventory_-MjQsZBgZlK1dydK9Iw6_itemname
attribs.current: A maker’s mark chisel used to mark your handiwork with the symbol of the clan of crafters you learned your skill from

attribs.name: repeating_inventory_-MjQsZBhR8nEaIo0ixw1_itemmodifiers
attribs.current: Item Type: Melee Weapon, Damage: 1d6, Damage Type: Piercing

attribs.name: repeating_inventory_-MjQsZBhR8nEaIo0ixw4_itemcontent
attribs.current: These special tools include the items needed to pursue a craft or trade. Proficiency with a set of artisan's tools lets you add your proficiency bonus to any ability checks you make using the tools in your craft. Each type of artisan's tools requires a separate proficiency.

attribs.name: repeating_inventory_-MjQsZBihgn5vTw5OjMf_itemmodifiers
attribs.current: Item Type: Heavy Armor, AC: 16, Stealth:Disadvantage

attribs.name: repeating_inventory_-MjQsZBihgn5vTw5OjMg_itemmodifiers
attribs.current: Item Type: Melee Weapon, Damage: 1d8, Damage Type: Slashing, Alternate Damage: 1d10, Alternate Damage Type: Slashing

attribs.name: repeating_inventory_-MjQsZBihgn5vTw5OjMh_itemcontent
attribs.current:
Ammunition: You can use a weapon that has the ammunition property to make a ranged attack only if you have ammunition to fire from the weapon. Each time you attack with the weapon, you expend one piece of ammunition. Drawing the ammunition from a quiver, case, or other container is part of the attack. At the end of the battle, you can recover half your expended ammunition by taking a minute to search the battlefield.

If you use a weapon that has the ammunition property to make a melee attack, you treat the weapon as an improvised weapon (see "Improvised Weapons" later in the section). A sling must be loaded to deal any damage when used in this way.

attribs.name: repeating_inventory_-MjQsZBihgn5vTw5OjMh_itemmodifiers
attribs.current: Item Type: Ranged Weapon, Damage: 1d8, Damage Type: Piercing, Range: 80/320,Critical Range: 20,Critical Range: 20,Critical Range: 20,Critical Range: 20

attribs.name: repeating_inventory_-MjQsZBihgn5vTw5OjMi_itemcontent
attribs.current: Ammunition: You can use a weapon that has the ammunition property to make a ranged attack only if you have ammunition to fire from the weapon. Each time you attack with the weapon, you expend one piece of ammunition. Drawing the ammunition from a quiver, case, or other container is part of the attack. At the end of the battle, you can recover half your expended ammunition by taking a minute to search the battlefield.

attribs.name: repeating_inventory_-MjQsZBkVOf-kCCLRxlt_itemcontent
attribs.current: A cloth or leather pouch can hold up to 20 sling bullets or 50 blowgun needles, among other things. A compartmentalized pouch for holding spell components is called a component pouch. A pouch can hold up to 1/5 cubic foot or 6 pounds of gear.

attribs.name: repeating_inventory_-MjQsZBkVOf-kCCLRxlu_itemcontent
attribs.current: A backpack can hold one cubic foot or 30 pounds of gear. You can also strap items, such as a bedroll or a coil of rope, to the outside of a backpack.

attribs.name: repeating_inventory_-MjQsZBkVOf-kCCLRxlv_itemcontent
attribs.current: Using a crowbar grants advantage to Strength checks where the crowbar's leverage can be applied.

attribs.name: repeating_inventory_-MjQsZBkVOf-kCCLRxly_itemcontent
attribs.current: A torch burns for 1 hour, providing bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light for an additional 20 feet. If you make a melee attack with a burning torch and hit, it deals 1 fire damage.

attribs.name: repeating_inventory_-MjQsZBkVOf-kCCLRxly_itemmodifiers
attribs.current: Item Type: Adventuring Gear, Damage: 1, Damage Type: Fire, Range: 20/40

attribs.name: repeating_inventory_-MjQsZBkVOf-kCCLRxlz_itemcontent
attribs.current: This small container holds flint, fire steel, and tinder (usually dry cloth soaked in light oil) used to kindle a fire. Using it to light a torch - or anything else with abundant, exposed fuel - takes an action. Lighting any other fire takes 1 minute.

attribs.name: repeating_inventory_-MjQsZBkVOf-kCCLRxm-_itemcontent
attribs.current: Rations consist of dry foods suitable for extended travel, including jerky, dried fruit, hardtack, and nuts.

attribs.name: repeating_inventory_-MjQsZBkVOf-kCCLRxm0_itemcontent
attribs.current: A waterskin can hold up to 4 pints of liquid.

attribs.name: repeating_inventory_-MjQsZBkVOf-kCCLRxm1_itemcontent
attribs.current: Rope, whether made of hemp or silk, has 2 hit points and can be burst with a DC 17 Strength check.
